title: Portland Tribune – Weyerhaeuser pulls plug on box plant
bodyHtml:
Portland Tribune

Weyerhaeuser pulls plug on box plant

By John Grund, June 18 2004

Workers at a Weyerhaeuser Co. cardboard box plant on North Marine Drive have been told the plant will close by the end of the summer, leaving as many as 30 people out of work.

Read full story here
